body.purpose: Descriptions and form parameter label guidelines.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Standard transition for workspace tabs and interactive card panels.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action call buttons for file compiling and processing.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #22d3ee; color: #050605; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; padding: 16px 24px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; transition: background-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Utility Card
components.html:
PDF Desk

Inspect and merge PDF layouts.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0d0e0d; border: 1px solid #202220; padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-card h4 { font-size: 18px; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card p { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Gauss is designed as a secure, local-first utility chamber. The design system rejects default cloud SaaS tropes, including neon gradients, excessive glowing particles, and cream backgrounds.
keyCharacteristics: Absolute offline feedback: Indicators confirming zero-network activity.
Deep solid dark theme: Minimal eye strain during lengthy review sessions.
Structural layout density: Orderly groupings instead of generic repeating card walls.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text must always maintain at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the dark background. Using faint, low-contrast text for secondary metadata is strictly prohibited.

rules.name: The Surface Frame Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not float via heavy blurs. Layout panels are delineated by flat border lines and background fills.

dos: Do use full boxed borders instead of single-side color stripes for indicators.
Do limit headings to a maximum height of 4.5rem to prevent visual crowding.
Do test every text size on mobile viewports to prevent layout overflow.
donts: Don't use decorative side-stripe accent borders on navigation items or cards.
Don't apply color gradient fills to typography.
Don't animate image assets or thumbnails on hover.
Don't use low-contrast text colors below the 4.5:1 ratio for secondary labels.
